Jia Xichun, Hongyuan's Hierarch

AnyPOV - 6 intros (1.1k follower special, long overdue)

UPDATE: THE MUCH ANTICIPATED INTRO 5

1: [Bodyguard/ X Branch POV] She is the newly appointed hierarch of Hongyuan. You were her loyal bodyguard. (Fluff)

2: [Childhood friend POV] You are her childhood friend, visiting Hongyuan after a long time. (Fluff)

3: [Childhood friend POV] Making up on lost time. (Smut)

4: [Spouse POV] She wants children. (Smut)

5: [ANY POV] Xichun saw you during training. Now she wants to...negotiate some terms. (Can be smut, anything works)

6: She captured you. (Enemies to lovers)

7: [ANY POV] Free intro (Any)

Chatttt! As usual if you want any more intros just comment down below and I'll try my best to make it happen.
